ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who received the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was issued */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "billing_city" TEXT /* City where the customer is billed */,
  "billing_state" TEXT /* State or province where the customer is billed */,
  "billing_country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is billed */,
  "billing_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code where the customer is billed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the invoice amount */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the item */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the product price */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, finance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice the reminder belongs to */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_method" TEXT /* Method used to send the reminder (e.g., email, letter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_reminders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_notes_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
